/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/openspodes_test_spodus.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/openspodes_test_spodus.dir/tests/test_spodus_concentrator.c.o CMakeFiles/openspodes_test_spodus.dir/tests/mock_transport.c.o CMakeFiles/openspodes_test_spodus.dir/tests/mock_crypto.c.o -o openspodes_test_spodus  libopenspodes.a _deps/cmocka-build/src/libcmocka.a
